themes.title: Core Collaboration Features
themes.description: Implementing essential features for real-time document collaboration.

themes.title: User Experience Enhancements
themes.description: Improving the editing experience and user feedback mechanisms.

themes.title: Feedback and Compliance
themes.description: Gathering user feedback and ensuring compliance with accessibility standards.

milestones.name: MVP Release
milestones.description: Launch the core real-time editing features.
milestones.success_criteria: All core features are functional and pass QA with 95% test coverage.

milestones.name: V1 Release
milestones.description: Enhance the mobile editing experience and add monitoring features.
milestones.success_criteria: Mobile editing experience is rated 4.5/5 by users and monitoring features are operational.

milestones.name: V2 Release
milestones.description: Implement user feedback collection and A/B testing for collaboration features.
milestones.success_criteria: User feedback collection is active with at least 100 responses and A/B tests yield actionable insights.

sequencing.reason: V1 enhancements depend on the successful launch of the MVP features.
V2 features require the completion of V1 enhancements to ensure a stable foundation.

v1.goal: Enhance user experience and monitoring capabilities.

v2.goal: Implement feedback mechanisms and testing strategies.
